scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @openoverlay/backend & npm run dev --workspace @openoverlay/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @openoverlay/shared && npm run build --workspace @openoverlay/backend && npm run build --workspace @openoverlay/frontend
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @openoverlay/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @openoverlay/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @openoverlay/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @openoverlay/frontend
